response.justification: Strong candidate with 20 years of full-stack engineering experience, significantly exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Demonstrates deep expertise in core stack technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes) and currently works directly on AI agent infrastructure with MCP frameworks—addressing a stated requirement. Proven architecture and system design skills across complex, high-scale systems. Minor gaps exist in explicit Nest.js framework experience and specific testing framework mentions (Jest/Vitest/Playwright), though extensive Node.js background and demonstrated TDD practice suggest rapid capability development. Holds required CS degree and shows strong delivery focus.
strengths: Current expertise in AI agent infrastructure and MCP development directly matches stated requirement for AI agent development experience
20+ years of full-stack engineering with proven depth in primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes) far exceeds minimum requirement
Strong architecture and system design skills demonstrated through founding open-source geo-platform, optimizing high-throughput micro-services, and building developer tooling
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned despite being primary requirement; extensive Node.js background mitigates but verification needed
Specific testing framework expertise (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not detailed; TDD background and testing workshops show methodology competency but tool familiarity unclear
PostgreSQL not mentioned in database experience (MongoDB and general SQL shown); relational database depth confirmation needed

key_factors.factor: Current AI agent and MCP framework work
20+ years experience depth with TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS core stack
